pages.title: Getting Started
pages.description: A quick-start guide to setting up your first chatbot, connecting a knowledge base, and deploying it on your website

pages.title: Deploying Your Chatbot
pages.description: Learn how to embed your chatbot on any website using the JavaScript widget, iframe, or REST API

pages.title: Understanding Credits & Usage
pages.description: Learn how credits work, what consumes them, and how to monitor your usage across AI tools and chatbots

categories.title: Chatbot Features
categories.description: Learn how to use advanced chatbot features

pages.title: Passing User Data to Chatbot
pages.description: Learn how to pass customer orders, inventory, and account data to your chatbot for personalized conversations

pages.title: Chatbot Memory & Identity Verification
pages.description: Learn how conversation memory works and how to verify returning users with email OTP verification

pages.title: Customizing Widget Appearance
pages.description: Learn how to customize the chatbot widget to match your brand with colors, fonts, positioning, and styling options

pages.title: Telegram Live Handoff
pages.description: Connect your chatbot to Telegram so visitors can be handed off to human agents in real-time

pages.title: Knowledge Base Guide
pages.description: Learn how to build and manage your chatbot's knowledge base with URLs, text, and Q&A sources

pages.title: Sentiment & Loyalty Analysis
pages.description: Understand how AI-powered sentiment analysis and visitor loyalty tracking work for your chatbot conversations

pages.title: Leads & Conversations
pages.description: Learn how to collect visitor information through pre-chat forms and manage conversation history

pages.title: Post-Chat Surveys
pages.description: Learn how to configure post-chat surveys, collect visitor feedback, and analyze rating data

pages.title: Escalations & Reporting
pages.description: Learn how conversation escalations work, including visitor-reported issues and live agent handoff

pages.title: Agent Console
pages.description: Learn how to manage live conversations, respond to visitors in real-time, and handle handoff sessions from the dashboard

pages.title: Proactive Messages
pages.description: Learn how to configure automated messages that trigger based on visitor behavior like time on page, scroll depth, or exit intent

pages.title: File Uploads in Chat
pages.description: Learn how to enable and configure file uploads so visitors can share images, documents, and other files during conversations

pages.title: Performance Dashboard
pages.description: Monitor chatbot response times with pipeline waterfall visualization and latency metrics

pages.title: Analytics Dashboard
pages.description: Track chatbot usage with conversation counts, visitor metrics, satisfaction rates, and daily trends

pages.title: Transcript Email
pages.description: Let visitors receive a copy of their chat conversation via email

pages.title: API Integration Guide
pages.description: Learn how to integrate with the VocUI API programmatically for custom implementations and server-side integrations
